summary: Tested URL and label mismatch fixes across the app for digital cards vs landing pages. All 5 requested features verified: 1) Quick-send digitalcard uses /card/ URL, 2) Home 'Share My Card' modal uses /card/ URL, 3) Contact page 'Share Digital Card' tile renamed correctly, 4) New 'Share Landing Page' tile added for /p/ URL, 5) Digital card visitor button shows 'Save My Contact' with download icon. Found and fixed a syntax bug (extra '}') in the button JSX.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/home.tsx lines 525-528 - share-card case uses /card/${userId} URL
VERIFIED: /app/frontend/app/contact/[id].tsx line 3794 - 'Share Digital Card' tile (renamed from 'Share Landing Page')
VERIFIED: /app/frontend/app/contact/[id].tsx line 3804 - NEW 'Share Landing Page' tile shares /p/ URL
FIXED: /app/frontend/app/card/[userId].tsx line 618 - Removed extra '}' from JSX (was causing 'Save My Contact }' display)
VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/card/vcard/{userId} returns valid VCF data with 200 status

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All URL and label fixes verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: URL and label mismatch fixes verified. Quick-send digitalcard uses /card/, home share modal uses /card/, contact page has separate 'Share Digital Card' (/card/) and 'Share Landing Page' (/p/) tiles. Digital card page visitor view shows 'Save My Contact' button that directly downloads VCF. Owner view shows 'Share My Contact' which opens modal.

contact_share_landing_page_tile.expected: NEW 'Share Landing Page' tile for /p/ URL

digital_card_visitor_button.expected: Visitor sees 'Save My Contact' with download icon, clicks directly download VCF
digital_card_visitor_button.actual: Save My Contact button visible for visitors

digital_card_owner_button.expected: Owner sees 'Share My Contact' which opens modal

bugs_fixed.issue: Extra '}' character in JSX causing 'Save My Contact }' display
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed ')}}'  to ')}' - removed extra closing brace
